decision.rationale: The bounded policy result shows the daily-status digest is already preserved truthfully as output evidence under a supported Runtime record/proof chain, so direct canonical support is not justified through current case semantics.
decision.stay_experimental_reason: Direct support would require new non-case digest semantics or synthetic candidate mapping; future similar digest content should be normalized into supported record/proof/report artifacts instead of widening the current truth anchor.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - clarifying the truth-anchor boundary is still valuable as shared Engine policy even without a runtime surface
